ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the dataset (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., anomaly, nominal) */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the dataset */,
  "score" REAL /* Score associated with the dataset */,
  "ground_truth" TEXT /* Ground truth value for the dataset */,
  "v1" REAL /* Value of feature V1 */,
  "v2" REAL /* Value of feature V2 */,
  "v3" REAL /* Value of feature V3 */,
  "v4" REAL /* Value of feature V4 */,
  "v5" REAL /* Value of feature V5 */,
  "v6" REAL /* Value of feature V6 */,
  "v7" REAL /* Value of feature V7 */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the original data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, CSV, database) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the dataset */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., V1, V2, V3) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was last updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_datasets" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was granted access to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the report is based on */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report (e.g., summary, findings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
column_names: Origin of the dataset (e.g., regression, classification)
Ground truth value for the dataset
Timestamp when the dataset was created
Timestamp when the dataset was last updated

Timestamp when the user account was created
